about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Engineer, Builder & Problem Solver
about.description: A B.Tech CSE (AIML) student at IEM Saltlake building across the full spectrum — AI/ML systems, full-stack web apps, IoT hardware, and open-source UI libraries. Currently exploring Agentic AI and cloud-native architecture.

leadIn.label: WHAT I DO
leadIn.thesis: I build intelligent systems across software, hardware, and the cloud — from AI pipelines to embedded IoT.
leadIn.scope: Focusing on agentic AI, full-stack engineering, open-source tooling, and real-world hardware systems built for production impact.
leadIn.bridging: Bridging code and the physical world.
leadIn.integration: Beyond software, I build hardware: cellular drones, RFID attendance systems, and smart IoT devices that close the loop between digital and physical.

coreEngineering.label: Core Engineering
coreEngineering.title:
Proven stack.
Measurable results.
coreEngineering.p1: I build AI systems using Python, LangChain, and Ollama — from local LLM inference and RAG pipelines to agentic orchestration and GenAI APIs on GCP.
coreEngineering.p2: Integrated into full-stack apps with Next.js, React, FastAPI, and Firebase, spanning web, mobile (Flutter), and embedded IoT (ESP32, RFID).
coreEngineering.p3: Every project ships with clean architecture, version control, and is built to scale — from embedded microcontrollers to cloud-deployed AI APIs.

emergingResearch.label: Exploration Phase
emergingResearch.title: EMERGING RESEARCH & EXPANSION

agentic.title: AGENTIC AI SYSTEMS
agentic.desc: Exploring autonomous agents, multi-agent orchestration, and reasoning frameworks — extending my applied AI foundation into self-directed decision-making systems.

web3.title: WEB3 & BLOCKCHAIN
web3.desc: Building decentralized applications with Solidity and Hardhat. Currently hands-on with smart contract development through projects like the Web3 Guestbook DApp on Ethereum.

profile.title:
Architecting Scalable Systems
Where Intelligence Meets Engineering.
profile.narrative: As a B.Tech CSE (AIML) student at IEM Saltlake, I build across disciplines — from AI/ML models and full-stack web apps to embedded IoT hardware and open-source UI libraries.
profile.narrative2: My work combines systems thinking, hardware engineering, and intelligent software to deliver solutions that are reliable, scalable, and built for real-world impact.

reliable.title: Robust by Design
reliable.desc: Engineered for reliability under scale and operational pressure.

optimized.title: Production-Ready
optimized.desc: From prototype to deployment with engineering discipline.

maintainable.title: Architected for Evolution
maintainable.desc: Designed to grow, adapt, and sustain long-term system development.

evolvable.title: Data-Driven Intelligence

experiencesList.desc: Building a tech venture focused on intelligent engineering tools. Leading product development across full-stack, AI integration, and go-to-market strategy.
Completed an industry internship focused on full-stack web development and software engineering practices — delivering production-ready features under real-world project constraints.
Completed all tracks: AI/ML APIs, Security, Data Engineering, DevOps CI/CD, and Networking on GCP. Hands-on with Vertex AI, Gemini, BigQuery ML, and GKE.
Built a smart shoe with embedded sensors for foot tracking, fall detection, and emergency signaling — executing hardware-software co-design under competition conditions.
Pursuing BTech in Computer Science with AI/ML specialization. Building production projects across AI, full-stack, IoT, and mobile domains alongside coursework.

projectsList.title: ThermalSense AI
projectsList.desc: Embedded AI system combining ESP32 thermal sensors with a TFLite CNN model for real-time anomaly detection. Streams over MQTT to a live Next.js dashboard.

projectsList.title: ESG Auditor 2.0
projectsList.desc: Enterprise AI platform for ESG & supply chain risk intelligence. Powered by local LLMs (Phi3/Ollama) — sensitive documents never leave your infrastructure.

projectsList.title: Attendinn System
projectsList.desc: Full-stack smart attendance with Flutter mobile app, ESP32 RFID gate entry dock, and Firebase real-time sync. Covers hardware, mobile, and web admin.

projectsList.title: Long-Range FPV Drone
projectsList.desc: Custom FPV drone with 4G/5G cellular control and satellite telemetry — engineered to bypass traditional radio frequency distance limits.

projectsList.title: JKFitness App
projectsList.desc: Full-stack fitness tracking app with workout logging, progress analytics, personal record detection, and custom routine builder. Next.js + FastAPI + Supabase.

hero.title: LET'S TALK
hero.subtitle: Have an idea? Let's build something extraordinary together.

faqData.q: What is your main area of expertise?
faqData.a: I'm a B.Tech CSE (AIML) student at IEM Saltlake who builds across disciplines — AI/ML systems (TFLite, LangChain, Ollama), full-stack web apps (Next.js, FastAPI, React), IoT & embedded hardware (ESP32, MQTT, C++), and cross-platform mobile apps (Flutter). My projects tend to combine multiple domains rather than stay in one lane.

faqData.q: Are you available for internships or freelance work?
faqData.a: Yes — I'm actively looking for internships and open to freelance collaborations in AI engineering, full-stack development, or IoT systems. I'm particularly drawn to projects that span hardware and software, or that involve deploying AI into real products.

faqData.q: What is your typical tech stack?
faqData.a: For AI/ML: Python, TensorFlow Lite, LangChain, Ollama (local LLMs), OpenCV. For web: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, FastAPI. For IoT/embedded: ESP32, C++, MQTT, Firebase. For mobile: Flutter & Dart. For databases: PostgreSQL, ChromaDB, Neo4j.

faqData.q: What are you currently working on?
faqData.a: Currently expanding Attendinn (smart attendance system), exploring agentic AI pipelines with multi-step tool use, and deepening my work on edge ML — running quantised models on microcontrollers. Also studying for cloud certifications and taking on freelance full-stack projects.

faqData.q: How can we get in touch?
faqData.a: Use the contact form on this page or email me directly at arnabchatterjee281205@gmail.com. You can also find me on GitHub (@ArnabOPP) and LinkedIn. I typically respond within 24 hours.
